[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-indian-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Andaman Honeymoon Packages at ATW Travels”][vc_column_text]

A honeymoon is the best time for couples to get away from the hustle and bustle of the wedding and steal some time together. The secret to enjoying a romantic vacation lies in proper planning and preparation. At ATW Travels, we’ve been arranging romantic getaways for young couples since 1968. Our all-inclusive packages take the stress out of vacation planning and ensure you have a memorable time together.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why Is Andaman a Popular Choice for Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

If your idea of a romantic vacation includes pristine beaches, adventure activities, and delectable food, the Andaman Islands are a perfect choice. If you love watersports, choose Andaman honeymoon packages that include water-based activities like scuba diving, sea karting, snorkeling, jet-skiing, and underwater sea walking. And if you’re a diehard romantic at heart, choose Andaman honeymoon packages that include the sun, sand, and sea.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19394″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Tips To Help You Make the Most of Your Andaman Honeymoon:” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_column_text]

Monsoon is the best time to book a low-cost Andaman honeymoon tour package. If you’ve booked your vacation during the monsoon, carry umbrellas and raincoats, mosquito repellants, a torch, a power bank, and enough dry snacks to tide through bad weather.

Follow all safety instructions when undertaking water-based activities. This includes avoiding the beach at night, swimming only in demarcated areas, hiring certified instructors to learn scuba diving or other watersport activities.

The rules regarding Restricted Area Permit (RAP) are updated frequently. Before booking a romantic Andaman honeymoon tour package, you should check with your travel planner.[/vc_column_text][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How Much Does a Typical Andaman Honeymoon Package Cost?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Andaman honeymoon packages vary depending on the season, the number of travelers, itinerary, and activities you may have chosen. At ATW Travels, we often suggest the five-nights and six-days package (INR 51,548) for couples looking for a week-long package and the three nights and four days (INR 21,904) for those looking for a quick romantic getaway.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646218862494{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

+91 9693339999

[/vc_column_text][vc_separator el_width=”30″][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-envelope” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786244533{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

info@atwtravels.com

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1644654313324{border-left-width: 1px !important;border-left-color: #ffffff !important;border-left-style: solid !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646218873883{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Book Your Packages

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Which Part of Andaman Is Best for A Honeymoon?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Andaman is a wonderful place with plenty of sightseeing locations. Make sure your package includes some or all of these places.

  • Cellular Jail, Jolly Buoy Island, Chidiya Tapu, and Samudrika Museum in Port Blair
  • Visit Elephant Beach, Radhanagar Beach, and Mangrove Forest in Havelock Island
  • Enjoy Kalapathar Beach and cruise ride in Neil Island
  • Travel through the Jarawa Tribe Reserve to visit Baratang Island.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Is the Best Time to Visit Andaman for A Honeymoon?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

July to September are the monsoon season and not ideal for a honeymoon vacation. October to May is the tourist season because the weather is pleasant and mild.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19396″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why Choose Us to Book Andaman Honeymoon Packages?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

ATW Travels offers the best Andaman trip packages for couples. We offer all-inclusive deals that include factors essential for a stress-free honeymoon.

  • Legitimate and licensed tour operator with international trade partners
  • 24/7 for excellent customer services
  • Affordable honeymoon packages
  • All-inclusive deals
  • Over 40 years of experience in planning tour packages

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Beaches in Andaman Islands” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_custom_heading text=”Corbyn’s Cove” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Corbyn’s Cove is one of Port Blair’s most popular tourist destinations. It is famous for its lush green coconut palms, watersport activities, and delectable cuisine. If you enjoy adventure sports, don’t miss this place.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Wandoor Beach” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Wandoor beach is another major attraction in Port Blair and a part of the Mahatma Gandhi Marine National Park area. The water here is perfect for swimming, but make sure you stay within the area restricted for the purpose.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Radhanagar Beach” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This beach was listed among the top 8 beaches globally and the best among the top 10 beaches by Trip Advisor. It was voted Asia’s Best Beach in 2004 by Time Magazine.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19398″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Elephant Beach” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

The Elephant Beach offers plenty of water-based activities, including scuba diving, kayaking, snorkeling, and fishing. It is famous for its marine biodiversity, beautiful coral reefs, and exotic marine life.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Vijaynagar Beach” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Vijayanagar Beach lies to the northeast part of Havelock Island. Thanks to its remote location, it is less crowded and perfect for a romantic stroll with your loved one. You could also rest on one of the many hammocks that dot the coconut trees on the beach.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Top Places That Must Be a Part of Your Romantic Andaman Honeymoon Tour Package” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Here are some of the places you mustn’t miss on your honeymoon:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Havelock Island” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This is the largest island in the Andamans and is famous for its pristine beaches and amazing marine life. Some of the island’s popular attractions include Radhanagar Beach, Elephant Beach, and Kalapathar. It is also close to Car Nicobar, the headquarters of the Nicobar District. If you’re planning to take up scuba diving, snorkeling, swimming, etc., pick Andaman honeymoon packages that include this place on the itinerary.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Neil Island” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Neil Island is secluded and hence less crowded when compared to Neil Island. The entire island stretches to 5kms and covers around 18 km. Most Andaman honeymoon packages include Neil Island as a day trip, although there are a few luxury resorts on the island. The place is loved for its aesthetic beauty and white sandy beaches, making it perfect for romantic evening strolls. You should never miss your chance to enjoy a candle night dinner at one of the beaches.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19400″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Little Andaman” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Little Andaman is farthest from Port Blair, the headquarters of Andaman Islands. But don’t let the name fool you – it is one of the largest islands open to tourism. Besides gorgeous beaches, it is popular for its breathtaking waterfalls, mangrove forest trails, and beautiful red palm tree plantations. Being a secluded place, this island offers privacy to lovey-dovey couples looking for a romantic getaway.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Cuthbert Bay Wildlife Sanctuary” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

The Cuthbert Bay Wildlife Sanctuary is famous because of the thousands of turtles nest on its beaches from December to February. The sanctuary is home to 4 different species of turtles, including Olive Ridley, Green Sea, Leatherback, and Hawksbill. It also hosts various wildlife like spotted deer, different varieties of kingfisher, heron, whistling duck, and various butterfly species.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Samudrika Marine Museum” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Samudrika Marine Museum, located near Andaman Teal House, is one of the most well-known tourist sites for all marine enthusiasts. This museum raises awareness about water and marine life and includes a sizeable collection of fishes, corals, and shells.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Hotels and Resorts to Stay in Andaman for Honeymoon”][vc_column_text]

Here is the list of the best hotels and resorts for you and your significant other to stay in and enjoy your honeymoon:

  1. SeaShell, Havelock
  2. SeaShell, Port Blair
  3. Symphony Summer Sands Beach Resort and Spa
  4. Symphony Samudra Beachside Jungle Resort and Spa
  5. TSG Blue Resort

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Get to know about our daily offers by visiting our Instagram Profile.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_empty_space height=”20px” css=”.vc_custom_1646647757781{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

FAQs about Andaman Honeymoon

What Is the Best Time to Honeymoon in Andaman?
We recommend you to visit Andaman between October and May. The weather is pleasant around this time, making it perfect for various water-based activities like scuba diving and snorkeling. But the best month to visit Andaman in January when the local administration holds the annual tourism festival.
How Many Days Are Enough for The Andaman Trip?
We suggest you pick a 5 Nights and 6 Days Andaman honeymoon tour package – it covers all main attractions and leaves you enough time for other activities. However, if you want a complete package, I suggest choosing the 9 Nights and 10 Days package.
Is Andaman Safe for Honeymoon Couples?
Yes, Andaman is a beautiful and safe destination. But you must not visit restricted areas without proper permission or guidance from local officials. There are enough lifeguards and instructors to help you learn water sports. But you must follow all instructions carefully and only swim in demarcated areas.
How Can I Reach Andaman?
You can take a flight to Port Blair to reach Andaman - flights are available to Port Blair from different Indian cities. Another option is to take a train or road trip to India to board a flight. Last but not least, we have waterways, but not very feasible as it takes two to three days to reach the place from the Indian Mainland.
What Are the Visa Requirements for International Travelers Visiting Andaman?
International travelers visiting Andaman require an Indian visa to enter India and then to Andaman.
